news.title:
KEC International repaid ₹75 Cr for listed commercial paper maturing on March 5, 2026.
Payment details were submitted to BSE; compliance with SEBI guidelines confirmed.
news.summary:
KEC International repaid ₹75 Cr for listed commercial paper maturing on March 5, 2026.
Payment details were submitted to BSE; compliance with SEBI guidelines confirmed.

news.title:
Indian EPC firms like L&T and KEC Intl face execution risks due to Iran-Israel conflict impacting Middle Eastern markets.
Shares of L&T fell 5%, KPIL dropped, while Middle East remains crucial for energy and infra projects.
news.summary:
Indian EPC firms like L&T and KEC Intl face execution risks due to Iran-Israel conflict impacting Middle Eastern markets.
Shares of L&T fell 5%, KPIL dropped, while Middle East remains crucial for energy and infra projects.

news.title:
KEC International reports work halted in UAE and Saudi due to US-Iran war.
Operations in Oman continue despite the regional challenges, per CNBC TV18.
news.summary:
KEC International reports work halted in UAE and Saudi due to US-Iran war.
Operations in Oman continue despite the regional challenges, per CNBC TV18.

news.title:
US-Iran conflict impacts Indian equities; Sensex drops 2,700 pts, later recovers partially, Nifty hovers at 24,850 amid crude price concerns.
Stocks like L&T (-7.5%), TCS (-3%), KEC (-12%), VA Tech (-12%), Kalyan Jewellers (-4%) face declines due to Middle East exposure.
news.summary:
US-Iran conflict impacts Indian equities; Sensex drops 2,700 pts, later recovers partially, Nifty hovers at 24,850 amid crude price concerns.
Stocks like L&T (-7.5%), TCS (-3%), KEC (-12%), VA Tech (-12%), Kalyan Jewellers (-4%) face declines due to Middle East exposure.

news.title:
KEC CEO Vimal Kejriwal states 20-25% of Rs 10,000 cr order book comes from Middle East.
Saudi, Oman operations unaffected; UAE projects, factory shut, impacting Rs 50 cr monthly.
news.summary:
KEC CEO Vimal Kejriwal states 20-25% of Rs 10,000 cr order book comes from Middle East.
Saudi, Oman operations unaffected; UAE projects, factory shut, impacting Rs 50 cr monthly.

news.title:
KEC International reports stable operations in Middle East, Saudi Arabia.
Company indicates no disruptions despite regional challenges.
news.summary:
KEC International reports stable operations in Middle East, Saudi Arabia.
Company indicates no disruptions despite regional challenges.

news.title:
Indian stocks like L&T, Kalyan Jewellers, KEC International, and Welspun Corp have substantial Middle East exposure.
Projects include desalination, infrastructure, and transmission, with L&T's 49% intl orders, KEC's Q4 bids, and Welspun's $1.7k cr capex.
news.summary:
Indian stocks like L&T, Kalyan Jewellers, KEC International, and Welspun Corp have substantial Middle East exposure.
Projects include desalination, infrastructure, and transmission, with L&T's 49% intl orders, KEC's Q4 bids, and Welspun's $1.7k cr capex.

news.title: KEC International confirms no additional capex needed for data center.
news.summary: KEC International confirms no additional capex needed for data center.

news.title:
KEC International secured new orders worth Rs. 1,002 crores across T&D, cables, and conductors.
These orders include Indian and international projects, boosting the YTD order intake to Rs. 21,300 crores.
news.summary:
KEC International secured new orders worth Rs. 1,002 crores across T&D, cables, and conductors.
These orders include Indian and international projects, boosting the YTD order intake to Rs. 21,300 crores.

news.title:
KEC International expects ₹1,000 crore annual revenue from data centers in coming years.
CEO Vimal Kejriwal anticipates significant cash inflows from large receivables soon.
news.summary:
KEC International expects ₹1,000 crore annual revenue from data centers in coming years.
CEO Vimal Kejriwal anticipates significant cash inflows from large receivables soon.

news.title: KEC International secures new orders worth ₹10.02 billion.
news.summary: KEC International secures new orders worth ₹10.02 billion.

news.title:
KEC International secured orders worth Rs. 1,020 crore across Civil, Transportation, T&D, and Cables sectors.
Projects include a multispeciality hospital, railway siding, and T&D supply in India and abroad.
news.summary:
KEC International secured orders worth Rs. 1,020 crore across Civil, Transportation, T&D, and Cables sectors.
Projects include a multispeciality hospital, railway siding, and T&D supply in India and abroad.

news.title:
KEC International reports a strong Q3FY26 order book of over ₹41,000 Cr, led by T&D at ₹26,000 Cr. Shares closed at ₹611.35, down 4%.
Waaree Energies' order book reached ₹60,000 Cr in Q3FY26; Premier Energies and Ashoka Buildcon report robust growth and strong demand visibility.
news.summary:
KEC International reports a strong Q3FY26 order book of over ₹41,000 Cr, led by T&D at ₹26,000 Cr. Shares closed at ₹611.35, down 4%.
Waaree Energies' order book reached ₹60,000 Cr in Q3FY26; Premier Energies and Ashoka Buildcon report robust growth and strong demand visibility.

news.title:
KEC International reports 12% revenue growth and targets Rs.41,000 crore order book.
The company plans capacity expansion by FY26 to support growth.
news.summary:
KEC International reports 12% revenue growth and targets Rs.41,000 crore order book.
The company plans capacity expansion by FY26 to support growth.

news.title:
KEC International's board approved selling 99% equity and 100% preference shares in a subsidiary.
The subsidiary's revenue is Rs.1,325 Cr, 6.1% of total; net worth Rs.954 Cr, 17.8% of consolidated net worth.
news.summary:
KEC International's board approved selling 99% equity and 100% preference shares in a subsidiary.
The subsidiary's revenue is Rs.1,325 Cr, 6.1% of total; net worth Rs.954 Cr, 17.8% of consolidated net worth.

news.title:
KEC International's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue totaled ₹6,001.35 crore with Q3 net profit of ₹127.46 crore; exceptional item of ₹58.78 crore recognized.
news.summary:
KEC International's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue totaled ₹6,001.35 crore with Q3 net profit of ₹127.46 crore; exceptional item of ₹58.78 crore recognized.

news.title:
KEC International's board meeting on Jan 30, 2026, to approve Q3 and 9-month FY25 results.
Trading window closed from Jan 1, 2026, to Feb 2, 2026, per insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
KEC International's board meeting on Jan 30, 2026, to approve Q3 and 9-month FY25 results.
Trading window closed from Jan 1, 2026, to Feb 2, 2026, per insider trading regulations.

news.title:
KEC International appoints Mr. Somraj Roy as Chief Human Resources Officer effective January 15, 2026.
Mr. Roy, with 30+ years of HR expertise, rejoins KEC from CEAT Ltd; he holds diverse HR and leadership qualifications.
news.summary:
KEC International appoints Mr. Somraj Roy as Chief Human Resources Officer effective January 15, 2026.
Mr. Roy, with 30+ years of HR expertise, rejoins KEC from CEAT Ltd; he holds diverse HR and leadership qualifications.

news.title:
India's T&D sector sees growth with a Rs 2.4 lakh crore capex plan by FY30, supporting 500 GW renewable energy goals.
Stocks like Hitachi Energy and KEC International benefit from rising order books, global demand, and strong execution in this sector.
news.summary:
India's T&D sector sees growth with a Rs 2.4 lakh crore capex plan by FY30, supporting 500 GW renewable energy goals.
Stocks like Hitachi Energy and KEC International benefit from rising order books, global demand, and strong execution in this sector.

news.title:
Road sector activity remains slow due to halted Bharatmala awards, subdued inflows.
No increase in FY26 road capex in the Budget has limited sector pickup.
news.summary:
Road sector activity remains slow due to halted Bharatmala awards, subdued inflows.
No increase in FY26 road capex in the Budget has limited sector pickup.
